packages.name: @absolutejs/auth
packages.description: Human, service, and agent authentication with native agent registration and claim flows.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent
packages.description: Provider-agnostic agent action contracts, policy gates, approvals, idempotency, and audit hooks.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agents-mcp
packages.description: Official MCP server for finding verified agents and production agent-first AbsoluteJS packages.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent-discovery
packages.description: Signed, provider-neutral agent discovery documents, registries, search, presentation, and hardened remote resolution.

packages.name: @absolutejs/a2a
packages.description: A2A 1.0 agent cards, messaging, tasks, streaming, and authorization-aware handlers.

packages.name: @absolutejs/mcp
packages.description: Production MCP servers and clients with current protocol support and secure agent-facing primitives.

packages.name: @absolutejs/arazzo
packages.description: Arazzo 1.1 parsing, validation, dependency planning, runtime expressions, authorization, and execution.

packages.name: @absolutejs/webmcp
packages.description: Secure WebMCP tool registration, policy, approvals, metadata validation, and abort-aware browser execution.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agency
packages.description: Durable, attenuated agent delegation with cascading revocation, resource/effect/spend bounds, and PostgreSQL storage.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent-conformance
packages.description: Cross-protocol conformance suites for MCP, A2A, Arazzo, WebMCP, auth, and safe action semantics.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent-control
packages.description: Secure operator console and bound plan-then-execute playground for inspecting and approving agent actions.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent-reputation
packages.description: Scoped, expiring, revocable agent reputation evidence using W3C Verifiable Credentials and JOSE/COSE adapters.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent-runtime
packages.description: Runtime lifecycle and execution foundations for production agents.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent-sandbox
packages.description: Isolation and resource controls for untrusted agent workloads.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent-trust
packages.description: Trust decisions and evidence plumbing for agent interactions.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent-memory
packages.description: Policy-aware durable agent memory.

packages.name: @absolutejs/agent-inbox
packages.description: Durable agent-to-human and agent-to-agent inbox workflows.

packages.name: @absolutejs/wallet
packages.description: Limited-funds wallets and payment controls suitable for bounded agent spending.

packages.name: @absolutejs/manifest
packages.description: Machine-readable package manifests that teach agents how to use AbsoluteJS packages.

packages.name: @absolutejs/policy
packages.description: Composable policy decisions for agent and application actions.

packages.name: @absolutejs/secrets
packages.description: Secret access and lifecycle controls for applications and agents.

packages.name: @absolutejs/telemetry
packages.description: Telemetry primitives for observable agent operations.

packages.name: @absolutejs/audit
packages.description: Tamper-evident action audit records.

packages.name: @absolutejs/execution
packages.description: Bounded execution primitives for applications and agents.
